description: Story C. R7 WHOLE-DRAFT EVAL -- run the full 14-spec sequence + render-whole-draft; judge coverage across the assembled draft.
acceptance_criteria: Scanning the assembled whole-plan draft, every schoolwide learner outcome appears at least once or is listed in an explicit gap section -- machine-checked, zero unaccounted outcomes.
Every improvement area appears at least once or is listed in the gap section -- machine-checked, zero unaccounted areas.
The coverage check runs over the assembled draft (all specs combined), not a single spec in isolation.
